Video.summary: A legend in the exploitation genre, these are the films that define director Jack Hill's career.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold and seductive. Provocative and iconic. These boundary-pushing movies live on the edge.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Duck You Suckers! It's time for more Grindhouse trailer fun from TFH!
Video.title: Revenge of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: When “Boxcar Bertha” and “Bloody Mama” took a trip to “Hollywood Boulevard,” they told some car thieves to “Eat My Dust,” and drove off like they were extras in “Death Race 2000.”
Video.title: The Corman Cinematic Universe

Video.summary: From frozen fights to winter warfare, it's a blizzard of bone-chilling big screen action hits!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Bullitt to Bad Lieutenant, filmmakers discuss cops that kick ass on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the past to the future, laying down the law comes easy to these big screen cops!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a closer look at the classic films of William Friedkin, Brian De Palma, and John Carpenter.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look back at the epic adventures, timeless dramas, and groundbreaking sci-fi classics that defined Charlton Heston's career.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlton Heston: Man of Monumental Movies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This is Sidney Poitier at his best: bold roles, powerful stories, and a legacy that transformed American cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's time to load up and throw down with these decade-spanning action favorites!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These hard-hitting action flicks are packed with daring heists, gritty gunplay, and unforgettable heroes.
Video.grandparentTitle: ACTION!!! Vol. 5: Grit, Guns, and Getaways
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A high-octane collection of tough-as-nails action flicks featuring iconic heroes, explosive chases, and unforgettable showdowns.
Video.grandparentTitle: ACTION!!! Vol. 6: Bold Movies and Big Attitude
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These are the films that made Bruce Lee the greatest martial artist in Hollywood history.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Sonny Chiba’s karate master is hired to retrieve a mysterious tape and winds up betrayed by the gangsters that gave him the job. Now, he’ll have his revenge!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: They're not all super, but these are the heroes that Hollywood needs right now.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Five films. One legacy. Here's why Clint Eastwood's Harry Callahan is a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Three directors. Three unique styles. Three incredible legacies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step inside a world of streetwise anti-heroes, rebels, and genre-defining Black filmmakers who did things their own way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Street Kings: Icons, Outlaws, and Originals
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These heist and detective classics explore the moral ambiguity and dark psychology of the criminal underworld.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 1: The Criminal Code
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's an action bonanza of cops, robbers, and vengeance in these crime and exploitation hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 2: Grit and Glory
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Betrayal, justice, and moral complexity are on the menu in these moody and violent crime flicks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 3: The Dark Side of Justice
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrating the bold storytelling, unforgettable characters, and cultural impact of Black cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: Rebels, Icons, and Revolution: A Journey Through Black Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stay off the streets when these Hollywood stars get behind the wheel.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These heart-racing hits have been thrilling movie audiences for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Get Comfy On the Edge of Your Seat
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These women play for keeps in the darkest alleys of noir cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From smoldering glances to deadly betrayals, these thrillers show just how far desire can push the human heart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH celebrates Alfred Hitchcock and the masterful storytelling that still keeps audiences on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These mystery movies have gripped audiences for decades. What's their secret?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A young woman (Etsuko Shihomi) battles a drug lord’s army in this spinoff of Sonny Chiba’s Street Fighter series.
Video.title: Sister Street Fighter

Video.summary: A black actor’s dream of making a movie becomes a nightmare when he’s forced to borrow money from local gangsters. Calvin Lockhart headlined this 1977 blaxploitation classic on the heels of “Let’s Do It Again” and “Uptown Saturday Night.”
Video.title: The Baron

Video.summary: Enter the “36th Chamber of the Shaolin” to a world of fast flying fists of fury!
Video.title: Fists of Legend

Video.summary: Like your Film Noir with a dash of “Body Heat,” while having dinner in “Chinatown?” Tune in!
Video.title: Neo-Noir Necessities
